sections.paragraph:
m. (from the root קָרָא).-

(1) a calling together, convocation, pr. Aram. inf. of the root קָרָא, Num 10:2, לִמִקְרָא הָעֵדָה “to call together an assembly.” Hence-(a) an assembly called together, a sacred convocation called together, πανήγυρις, Isa 1:13. Often מִקְרָא קֹדֶשׁ. Lev 23:2, seq.; Num 28:18, 25 Num 28:25.-(b) a place of holy convocation, pl. sanctuaries, Isa 4:5.

(2) recitation, reading, Neh 8:8, “they listened to the reading.”
